name: staged-review
description: Universal three-tier code review workflow — pre-commit (code-review), pre-merge cloud-agent PR gate (commit-review), post-commit / post-merge audit (audit-review). v1.17: audit-status command + unaudited-commits SessionStart hook — read-only `/staged-review:audit-status` shows per-branch drift from last audit(...) ancestor; SessionStart hook auto-flags ≥3 unaudited commits so context-switched sessions don't accumulate silent drift; both share `unaudited-commits.sh` helper. v1.16: audit-review skill — full 5+1 audit on committed code, mandatory parallel Codex dispatch, auto-applies hygiene fixes, auto-resolves discuss-design via Claude+Codex dialogue, writes .audit/<sha>.md + commits as audit(...). FULLY AUTONOMOUS. Auto-invoked by worktree-workflow, linear-workflow, and commit-review's auto-merge tail. commit-review SIMPLIFIED — narrowed to pre-merge correctness gate, AUTO-MERGES cloud-agent PRs on ✅ + green CI + 5 preconditions, then chains audit-review.
